file.content:
stop("only for standard model matrices")
  # convert coefficients to log scale
  coefColumns <- names(mcols(object))[grep("log2 fold change",mcols(mcols(object))$description)]
  beta <- log(2) * as.numeric(as.data.frame(mcols(object)[rowNumber,coefColumns,drop=FALSE]))
  x <- getModelMatrix(object)
  y <- counts(object)[rowNumber,]
  sf <- sizeFactors(object)
  alpha <- dispersions(object)[rowNumber]
  mu.hat <- as.vector(sf * exp(x %*% beta))
  minmu <- 0.5
  mu.hat[mu.hat < minmu] <- minmu
  w <- diag(1/(1/mu.hat^2 * ( mu.hat + alpha * mu.hat^2 )))

file.content:
estimateSizeFactorsIterate <- function(object, niter=10, Q=0.05) {
  design(object) <- ~ 1
  sf <- rep(1, ncol(object))
  idx <- MatrixGenerics::rowSums(counts(object)) > 0
  cts <- counts(object)[idx,]
  for (i in seq_len(niter)) {
    sizeFactors(object) <- sf
    object <- estimateDispersions(object, fitType="mean", quiet=TRUE)
    q <- t(t(assays(object)[["mu"]])/sf)[idx,]
    disps <- dispersions(object)[idx]
    sf.old <- sf
    fn <- function(p) {
      sf <- exp(p - mean(p))
      mu.new <- t(t(q) * sf)
      ll <- matrix(dnbinom(cts, mu=mu.new, size=1/disps, log=TRUE), ncol=ncol(cts))

file.content:
#' @export
setReplaceMethod("dispersionFunction", signature(object="DESeqDataSet", value="function"), dispFun.replace)

dispersions.DESeqDataSet <- function(object) mcols(object)$dispersion

#' Accessor functions for the dispersion estimates in a DESeqDataSet
#' object.
#' 
#' The dispersions for each row of the DESeqDataSet.  Generally,
#' these are set by \code{\link{estimateDispersions}}.
#' 
#' @rdname dispersions
#'
#' @param object a \code{DESeqDataSet} object.
#' @param value the dispersions to use for the Negative Binomial modeling
#' @param ... additional arguments
#'
#' @author Simon Anders
#' @seealso \code{\link{estimateDispersions}}
#' 
#' @export
setMethod("dispersions", signature(object="DESeqDataSet"),
          dispersions.DESeqDataSet)

#' @rdname dispersions

## DESeq2 中 `dispersions()` 的所有调用点

### S4 方法分发

`dispersions(dds)` 对 `DESeqDataSet` 对象分发到：

```r
# methods.R:196 & 214
dispersions.DESeqDataSet <- function(object) mcols(object)$dispersion

setMethod("dispersions", signature(object="DESeqDataSet"),
          dispersions.DESeqDataSet)
```

即：**读取 `mcols(object)$dispersion` 列**（行级元数据中的 `dispersion` 字段）。

---

### 所有调用点（共 14 处）

| 文件 | 行号 | 所在函数 |
|---|---|---|
| `plots.R` | 32 | `plotDispEsts.DESeqDataSet` |
| `plots.R` | 33 | `plotDispEsts.DESeqDataSet` |
| `core.R` | 1338 | `nbinomWaldTest` |
| `core.R` | 1649 | `estimateBetaPriorVar` |
| `core.R` | 1800 | `nbinomLRT` |
| `core.R` | 2407 | `covarianceMatrix` |
| `core.R` | 2618 | `estimateSizeFactorsIterate` |
| `lfcShrink.R` | 211 | `lfcShrink` |
| `lfcShrink.R` | 361 | `lfcShrink` |
| `results.R` | 803 | `getContrast` |
| `fitNbinomGLMs.R` | 64 | `fitNbinomGLMs` |
| `fitNbinomGLMs.R` | 181 | `fitNbinomGLMs` |
| `fitNbinomGLMs.R` | 182 | `fitNbinomGLMs` |
| `methods.R` | 538 | `estimateDispersions.DESeqDataSet` |

**两处排除说明：**
- `core.R:878`：出现在 `stop()` 的错误消息字符串内，是文本而非函数调用
- `methods.R:701`：roxygen 文档注释 `#' head(dispersions(dds))`，非实际调用

---

### 汇总

- **总调用点数：14**
- **涉及的不同函数：10 个**（`plotDispEsts.DESeqDataSet`、`nbinomWaldTest`、`estimateBetaPriorVar`、`nbinomLRT`、`covarianceMatrix`、`estimateSizeFactorsIterate`、`lfcShrink`、`getContrast`、`fitNbinomGLMs`、`estimateDispersions.DESeqDataSet`）
- **分发目标**：`dispersions.DESeqDataSet` → `mcols(object)$dispersion`
